---
title: "Binomial Distribution in Epidemiology"
subtitle: "MOD002"
id: "BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION"
toc: false
---

Single-page learning page.

## Sessions


- [SE01: Binomial Distribution in Epidemiology](se01/index.qmd)

```{=html}
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
    </div>

        <a href="se01/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Binomial Distribution in Epidemiology</span>

```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
